history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark mobile game-style screen shows a profile header and multiple interactive icons and status indicators.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a horizontally oriented game UI panel with a profile name at the top left, a badge/check indicator, a level readout, an experience bar, and several rounded buttons/icons including “VOID,” “Minigame,” and messaging/notification circles.

Setting:
This is an indoor digital interface view with no real-world environment shown; the background is a dark gradient with subtle lighting and UI elements arranged in rows. The lighting is consistent with a screen capture, with bright text and icons standing out against the dark background.

Visual Details:
At the top left there is a circular avatar image showing a stylized illustrated person with dark hair. Next to it, large white text reads “虚無 Arimbi Hafid.” To the right are a “#3236921” text value, and a blue checkmark badge. Further right is a red circular badge with “99+” near a bell icon, and below it another red circle with “1” near a speech bubble icon. In the middle are a purple rounded button labeled “VOID” with a small icon on the left side of that button, and a green panel showing “Lvl. 2.586” with a green gem-like icon. Below, there is a long experience bar with the label “Exp” on the left and “233/1500” on the right. Along the bottom row are icons and labels: a blue gem icon with the number “0,” a gold key icon with the text “WibuGem,” an infinity symbol with the text “∞ Key,” and a dark rounded button labeled “Minigame” with a play-like triangle icon to the left of the text. The composition is a clean UI layout with rounded shapes, high-contrast colored icons (purple, green, red, blue, gold), and a dark background gradient.

Visible Text:
虚無 Arimbi Hafid
#3236921
VOID
Lvl. 2.586
Exp
233/1500
WibuGem
∞
Key
Minigame
99+
1
No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a dark, game-like user interface with a profile name, ID, level indicator, and an experience progress bar. It also displays multiple interactive buttons and icons for minigames, items, and notifications.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
